Eddie Howe given green light for £100m Newcastle United plan at Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans XI vs Nottingham Forest: Pope; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Longstaff, Guimaraes, Willock; Gordon, Joelinton, Isak. Newcastle United produced probably their two best peformances of the season so far in overcoming Chelsea and Arsenal in successive games in the last fortnight.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest miss out on 13-goal striker now valued at £60m and wanted by Liverpool
Newcastle United and Liverpool handed potential boost in transfer pursuit of La Liga star
arts.sum: The report, via Sport Witness, suggests the Premier League clubs have received a potential boost in their attempts to sign Bade as Sevilla may be forced to cash in on the centre-back to raise funds to aid their financial situation. Bade, whose previous clubs include Le Havre, Lens, Rennes and Nottingham Forest (loan), has a reported €60m (£50m) release clause in his current contract.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest predicted XI vs Newcastle, Nuno makes one change as major decision presents itself
arts.sum: A huge decision has presented itself!

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up for Nottingham Forest with Sandro Tonali dilemma
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Nottingham Forest: Pope; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Longstaff, Guimaraes, Willock; Joelinton, Gordon, Isak. After last season in which Eddie Howe was desperate for more options for his Newcastle United midfield, the Magpies head coach is now blessed with riches in that key area - and it makes for a selection headache.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Nottingham Forest clash with one key addition
arts.sum: Murphy's return gives Howe the option of switching Anthony Gordon back to his favoured left flank, but that would mean disrupting the Joelinton-Joe Willock combination which worked so well against Arsenal. Eddie Howe will take a strong squad to the City Ground for Newcastle United's final game before the November international break.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle United TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: How Eddie Howe and Newcastle United would love to sign off for the final international break of 2024 with a morale-boosting win at Nottingham Forest. We will bring you live coverage of the game via out matchday live blog from the City Ground, with all the build up, team news, match analysis, reaction and ratings.
